title: Stevens feenstra reintroduce legislation ensure cutting edge quantum computing
why:
- The Quantum in Practice Act would ensure quantum molecular simulations and modeling are included in the National Quantum Initiative.
- Quantum molecular simulations enable scientists to study chemical elements and reactions with unprecedented precision, benefiting fields like nitrogen fixation for fertilizer production.
- The legislation supports breakthroughs in automotive technology, battery development, advanced materials, and safer, more effective medications.
- The Act is backed by key industry and research organizations, including IBM, D-Wave, Quantinuum, and NSF-affiliated quantum centers.
- By directing federal research towards practical quantum applications, the bill aims to translate quantum innovations into real-world economic and industrial benefits.
